name: riichi-scorer
description: 微信云开发立直麻将多人记分小程序

scripts.build: npm run build:engine:cloud && npm run build:engine:mini && npm run build:functions
scripts.build:engine:cloud: rm -rf cloudfunctions/scoreHand/engine-lib && tsc -p engine/tsconfig.json --module CommonJS --moduleResolution Node --target ES2020 --outDir cloudfunctions/scoreHand/engine-lib --declaration false --declarationMap false
scripts.build:engine:mini: rm -rf miniprogram/utils/engine-lib && tsc -p engine/tsconfig.json --module CommonJS --moduleResolution Node --target ES2020 --outDir miniprogram/utils/engine-lib --declaration false --declarationMap false
